payload.text: 🧠 ChatTrivia — fast-paced multiple-choice trivia for your group! Tap a button on the menu to start a game, view the leaderboard, or manage questions. How it works: • Each round has up to 20 questions across 5 categories • You have 12 seconds per question — answer faster for more points • Correct answer: 20–100 pts depending on speed • Wrong or no answer: 0 pts Commands you can type: /start — Open the main menu /help — This help text /leaderboard — See all-time rankings /mystats — Your personal stats Everything else is reachable by tapping!

name: menu:help callback shows help with back button
